sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113896" key="xhnia/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χην-ιάζω</orth>, <sense id="n113896.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cackle like a goose,</tr_> of a bad flute-player, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0447.tlg001:77" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Diph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">77</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
